title: oenothera parryi f. tenuissima
intro: Oenothera parryi f. tenuissima, also known as Evening Primrose, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high levels of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), an essential fatty acid that has anti-inflammatory and moisturizing effects on the skin and body. The health benefits of Oenothera parryi f. tenuissima include reducing symptoms of eczema, acne, and other skin conditions, as well as alleviating menstrual cramps and other hormonal imbalances. The herbal preparations of this plant include oil extracts, capsules, and teas, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
